chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1805 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.05.2022 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar, advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhammad Arshad Pathan, advocate for HESCO Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Qazi, Assistant Attorney General *** Petitioner’s primary concern is that his representation/appeal/application is pending, which has not been decided, as reflected in the letter of 12.11.2020 of HESCO. Mr. Muhammad Arshad Pathan learned counsel for HESCO has out-rightly refuted, if any appeal in accordance with requirement of law is pending; however, he concedes that an application is pending; however, the issues arising therein have been set at rest. Be that as it may, he has also conceded that the certain documents were required from the petitioner in terms of the aforesaid letter. Both the learned counsels agreed that on submission of such documents, application/representation or any other formal application in the shape of an appeal, if pending, shall be decided by the authority concerned after hearing the petitioner in accordance with law within six weeks from the date of receipt of this order while keeping in mind that no discrimination be caused. Petition alongwith listed application(s) stand disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
